headline: Robinhood shares climb on slate of new offerings
summary: Robinhood shares close nearly 4% higher after unveiling a slate of new offerings, including its own blockchain, new stock tokens, agentic trading and DeFi products. Karen Tso and Ben Boulos discuss CEO Vlad Tenev's comments to CNBC.

headline: Why Robinhood (HOOD) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of financial services company Robinhood (NASDAQ:HOOD) jumped 3.4% in the afternoon session after the company unveiled its new 'Robinhood Chain' blockchain platform and a suite of crypto and AI-powered products at a company event, prompting positive reactions from analysts.

headline: Senior analyst revamps Robinhood price target amid hyperscaling potential
summary: An analyst at Mizuho believes Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ: HOOD) has big upside coming. On July 2, senior analyst Dan Dolev raised the stock's price target to $130 from $115 on Thursday while keeping an Outperform rating.
